entries.text: Hundreds of years ago, the Demon King plunged the world into darkness.
A hero, carrying a greatsword, bent hope into every corner of the land.
The heavy blade swept forward with cutting wind and savage flame.
Thunder rolled through the sky, passing judgment on the Demon King's sins.
At last, the Demon King fell beneath the hero's sword, and the power left behind was seized in the hero's hand.
A breeze crossed the lake and stirred faint ripples as the hero returned to the place where the journey began.
He wrote his travels into a book and sealed that power within its pages.
With his own strength, he bound the words with wards and shackles so they would not scatter.
The world would not allow only darkness, and so the hero brought hope.
But when has it ever allowed only hope? The old hero's power faded with the years.
A new Demon King will be born, using this book as a cradle and its words as nourishment.
When will a new hero appear?
As the last word of the old legend falls away, you finally step into a journey woven from ruins and flame.
So this is why I turned into a word? You want me to recover words and power for you?
The book in your hand glows faintly. An ancient mark is carved into its cover, as if waiting for your touch.
Watch the guide on the ground. Walk toward the door ahead, and begin your journey from there.
Use me well. The power of characters is the key to surviving these ruins. Each character has its own ability; learn them, and you can overcome what lies ahead.
Remember, you are not fighting alone.
Fine. I'll call it an immersive story and move forward.
